title: Student Conduct: Disruptions
description: Conroe ISD's rules on school disruptions explain what behaviors are considered disruptive to the educational environment, both on and off campus during school activities. Students are expected to avoid actions that interfere with the orderly operation of schools, including protests, demonstrations, or other conduct that interrupts learning. Understanding these expectations helps families know what standards of behavior apply and what consequences students may face for disruptive actions.
